title: phyla filiformis
intro: Phyla filiformis, also known as Texas frogfruit, is a shrub-like plant native to the southeastern United States. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties that help soothe and heal various health issues. The plant has been used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, and is also believed to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Phyla filiformis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be dried and used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
